bird.name: 红胸田鸡
bird.summary: 红胸田鸡（学名：Zapornia fusca）为秧鸡科小田雞屬的鸟类，又名绯秧鸡，分布於季風亞洲的沼澤和濕地。该物种的模式产地在菲律宾。 描述 緋秧雞體長約22至23公分。体重约57.27克，翼长约94.5毫米，嘴峰长约26毫米，喙宽度约3毫米，喙厚度约5.1毫米，跗蹠长约31…

relations.subject: 红胸田鸡
relations.evidence: thumb|left| In Kolkata, [[West Bengal, India ]] Its breeding habitat is swamps and similar wet areas across South Asia from the Indian subcontinent east to south China, Japan and Indonesia
relations.object_summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。

relations.subject: 红胸田鸡
relations.evidence: thumb|Ruddy-breasted Crake in Manglajodi, Odisha This crake nests in a dry location on the ground in marsh vegetation, laying 6-9 eggs
relations.object_summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。
